nasb.text: It came about as her soul was departing (for she died), that she named him Ben-oni; but his father called him Benjamin.

esv.text: And as her soul was departing (for she was dying), she called his name Ben-oni;  but his father called him Benjamin.

cnv.text: 拉結快要死了，正要斷氣的時候，她給她兒子起名叫便．俄尼；他的父親卻叫他便雅憫。

ccb.text: 拉结临死前给儿子取名叫便·俄尼，雅各却叫他便雅悯。

csbs.text: 她的灵魂快要出窍，她快死的时候，给儿子起名为本俄尼，他父亲却称他为本雅明。
